engine_label: Selenium headless Chrome (requests first, then browser if thin/error)
markdown:
[Timeline](index.html)

## Timeline 19TH F1TENTH AUTONOMOUS GRAND Prix

##### Timeline is subject to change. Please follow announcements in our slack channel for the latest updates.

DATE | IN-PERSON COMPETITION  
---|---  
May 1st |  [Registration Open](https://forms.gle/GcVn2K2THgxD7FRz5)  
June 13th  
10 am EDT | Orientation 1 (Online Meeting)   
Demonstrate expectations, prospective participants can ask questions  
July 3rd   
10am EDT | Orientation 2 (Online Meeting)   
Competition Rules overview, Track overview for in-person competition  
August 24th  
10 am EDT | Orientation 3 (Online Meeting)   
Registration closes  
Introduction of all teams, Race overview, Track release for virtual competition, Track overview for in-person competition  
September 3rd | Video Submission: Teams need to demonstrate driving with the F1TENTH vehicle before the competition  
September 16th | Teams Training  
All Teams can use the racetrack the whole day  
September 17th | Qualification Session  
September 18th | Race day  
Award Ceremony
